'''todafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stackless|stackless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stackless|stackless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| todafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:todafithi|todafithi]] || [[word:todafiji|todafiji]] || [[word:todafishi|todafishi]] || [[word:todafiki|todafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:todafuthuthu|todafuthuthu]] || [[word:todafujuju|todafujuju]] || [[word:todafushushu|todafushushu]] || [[word:todafukuku|todafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:todafuthu|todafuthu]] || [[word:todafuju|todafuju]] || [[word:todafushu|todafushu]] || [[word:todafuku|todafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:todafufthuf|todafufthuf]] || [[word:todafufjuf|todafufjuf]] || [[word:todafufshuf|todafufshuf]] || [[word:todafufkuf|todafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:todafethe|todafethe]] || [[word:todafeje|todafeje]] || [[word:todafeshe|todafeshe]] || [[word:todafeke|todafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:todafothotho|todafothotho]] || [[word:todafojojo|todafojojo]] || [[word:todafoshosho|todafoshosho]] || [[word:todafokoko|todafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:todafotho|todafotho]] || [[word:todafojo|todafojo]] || [[word:todafosho|todafosho]] || [[word:todafoko|todafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:todafofthof|todafofthof]] || [[word:todafofjof|todafofjof]] || [[word:todafofshof|todafofshof]] || [[word:todafofkof|todafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:todafÃŸfthÃŸf|todafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfjÃŸf|todafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfshÃŸf|todafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfkÃŸf|todafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:todafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|todafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|todafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|todafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|todafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:todafÃŸfthÃŸf|todafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfjÃŸf|todafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfshÃŸf|todafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfkÃŸf|todafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:todafÃŸfthÃŸf|todafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfjÃŸf|todafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfshÃŸf|todafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:todafÃŸfkÃŸf|todafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:todafÃḊthÃḊ|todafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:todafÃḊjÃḊ|todafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:todafÃḊshÃḊ|todafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:todafÃḊkÃḊ|todafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:todafathatha|todafathatha]] || [[word:todafajaja|todafajaja]] || [[word:todafashasha|todafashasha]] || [[word:todafakaka|todafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:todafatha|todafatha]] || [[word:todafaja|todafaja]] || [[word:todafasha|todafasha]] || [[word:todafaka|todafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:todafafthaf|todafafthaf]] || [[word:todafafjaf|todafafjaf]] || [[word:todafafshaf|todafafshaf]] || [[word:todafafkaf|todafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:todafasha|todafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:todafshÃḋsha|todafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todafrosha|todafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todafmusha|todafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:todafyasha|todafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodafnkshÃḋsha|gotodafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodafnkrosha|gotodafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodafnkmusha|gotodafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodafnkyasha|gotodafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:todadafasha|todadafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:todadafshÃḋsha|todadafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todadafrosha|todadafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todadafmusha|todadafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:todadafyasha|todadafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodadafnkshÃḋsha|gotodadafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodadafnkrosha|gotodadafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodadafnkmusha|gotodadafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodadafnkyasha|gotodadafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tedÃḊfasha|tedÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tedÃḊfshÃḋsha|tedÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tedÃḊfrosha|tedÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tedÃḊfmusha|tedÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tedÃḊfyasha|tedÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotedÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gotedÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotedÃḊfnkrosha|gotedÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotedÃḊfnkmusha|gotedÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotedÃḊfnkyasha|gotedÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:todfafasha|todfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:todfafshÃḋsha|todfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todfafrosha|todfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todfafmusha|todfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:todfafyasha|todfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodfafnkshÃḋsha|gotodfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodfafnkrosha|gotodfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodfafnkmusha|gotodfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodfafnkyasha|gotodfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
